case_title: SYLWESTER ALBIN SLOJEWSKI VS. ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FRED VIVANCO, PROJECT ENGINEER. FILED BY DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER ALBIN AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO , CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER ALBIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
CORRESPONDENCE (EXHIBITS RECD W/ CORRESPONDENCE)PLACED IN ENVELOPE MARKED DEFENDANT & PLACED IN FILE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2022 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF SYLWESTER ALBIN SLOJEWSKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KENNETH CORMICAN (SUBCONTRACTOR TO EGP) AND FRED VIVANCO (PROJECT ENGINEER). DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN (CLAIM ADJUSTER). COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SHERIFF'S $40 FEE WAIVED) SERVED AUG-09-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SHERIFF'S $40 FEE WAIVED) SERVED AUG-09-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO , CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KENNETH CORMICAN, SUBCONTRACTOR TO EGP. FILED BY DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO , CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER ALBIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
